result.stdout:
Credfeto.Package.Push 1.6.177.1729-main
Usage: pushpackages [--source <String>] [--folder <String>] [--api-key <String>] [--symbol-source <String>] [--help] [--version]

Uploads all packages in the folder

Options:
  -s, --source <String>       NuGet Feed to upload packages to (Required)
  -f, --folder <String>       Folder containing packages to upload (Required)
  -a, --api-key <String>      Api Key for uploading packages (Required)
  --symbol-source <String>    NuGet Feed to upload symbol packages to
  -h, --help                  Show help message
  --version                   Show version
